summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now anchors Tomas's first observed change to the work-bell return after the families' coerced compliance, and the closing line now hands off more directly into the next chapter's damp morning work scene.
edits: Adjusted the opening setup to reference the work bell pulling the families back into the naming circle.
Adjusted the final sentence to bridge into the next chapter's damp-coals morning work without changing chapter beats.
